message:
Fix package.json build scripts to use cass-memory.ts

Update all build scripts to reference src/cass-memory.ts instead of
the non-existent src/cm.ts. This fixes the build command that was
failing with ModuleNotFound error.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,12 +10,12 @@
   },
   "main": "./dist/cm.js",
   "scripts": {
-    "dev": "bun run src/cm.ts",
-    "build": "bun build src/cm.ts --compile --outfile dist/cm",
-    "build:linux": "bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cm-linux-x64",
-    "build:macos-arm": "bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cm-darwin-arm64",
-    "build:macos-x64": "bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cm-darwin-x64",
-    "build:windows": "bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/cm-windows-x64.exe",
+    "dev": "bun run src/cass-memory.ts",
+    "build": "bun build src/cass-memory.ts --compile --outfile dist/cm",
+    "build:linux": "bun build src/cass-memory.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cm-linux-x64",
+    "build:macos-arm": "bun build src/cass-memory.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cm-darwin-arm64",
+    "build:macos-x64": "bun build src/cass-memory.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cm-darwin-x64",
+    "build:windows": "bun build src/cass-memory.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/cm-windows-x64.exe",
     "build:all": "bun run build:linux && bun run build:macos-arm && bun run build:macos-x64 && bun run build:windows",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
     "test": "bun test",
